task_name: AI Weekly Newsletter from Web Curation
description: Browse Hacker News to curate AI-related articles, capture screenshots of source pages, and compile a professionally formatted weekly newsletter as a Word document.
prompt:
I am a tech team lead, and I am responsible for curating a weekly AI newsletter for our engineering team. I need you to browse Hacker News (https://news.ycombinator.com) and curate content for this week's newsletter.

First, take a screenshot of the Hacker News homepage and save it as hn_homepage.png. Then browse the listings and identify at least 5 articles related to AI, machine learning, or large language models. For each selected article, visit its linked page and take a screenshot of just the first visible viewport (no full-page scroll), saving them as article_1.png through article_5.png.

Compile the curated content into newsletter.docx with the following structure:
- Newsletter title and date
- Editor's note: a brief overview of this week's AI landscape (100-200 words)
- Article entries: for each article include the title, source URL, a summary (50-100 words), and reference the corresponding screenshot
- Weekly trend summary: synthesize the common themes across the curated articles

evaluators.description: Check that at least 5 article screenshot PNGs exist
